name: Lincoln Almond Cake
recipeInstructions: Preheat the oven to 350°F. Cream together the sugar and butter. Sift together flour and baking powder three times; slowly add to the butter and sugar mixture alternately with milk, in small amounts at a time. Mix thoroughly. Add chopped blanched almonds and vanilla to the mixture. Continue beating until thoroughly mixed. In a separate bowl, stiffly beat egg whites with salt. Gently fold into the first mixture. Pour into a greased and floured angel food cake pan or bundt pan. Bake for approximately one hour, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean. Turn out on a wire rack and allow to cool upside down for a few minutes until able to gently remove from the pan. Before serving, cut with a serrated bread or cake knife to avoid tearing.
